content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 21, 2001

James C. Harrison
Remcho, Johansen & Purcell
201 Delores Avenue
San Leandro, CA 94577

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-208

Dear Mr. Harrison:

This letter is regarding your request for advice on the gift provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1

Pursuant to our conversation of September 19, 2001, and your subsequent voice mail message, please consider this correspondence as formal notification that your request for written advice regarding Chuck Cake, Chief Deputy Director of the Office of Industrial Relations has been withdrawn.

If you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

MLM:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\01-208

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
